ddls:
CREATE TABLE "samples" (
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sample */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Source name of the sample */,
  "organism" TEXT /* Organism from which the sample is derived */,
  "organism_part" TEXT /* Part of the organism from which the sample is taken */,
  "age" TEXT /* Age of the organism */,
  "developmental_stage" TEXT /* Developmental stage of the organism */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the organism */,
  "ancestry_category" TEXT /* Ancestry category of the organism */,
  "disease" TEXT /* Disease associated with the sample */,
  "cell_type" TEXT /* Cell type of the sample */,
  "cell_line" TEXT /* Cell line of the sample */,
  "treatment" TEXT /* Treatment applied to the sample */,
  "treatment_control" TEXT /* Control treatment applied to the sample */,
  "enrichment_method" TEXT /* Method used for enrichment of the sample */,
  "enrichment_process" TEXT /* Process used for enrichment of the sample */,
  "sample_type" TEXT /* Type of biological sample (e.g., tissue, blood, cell line) */,
  "sample_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the sample (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "storage_conditions" TEXT /* Conditions under which the sample is stored */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date when the sample was collected */,
  "donor_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the donor (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_samples_donor_id FOREIGN KEY ("donor_id") REFERENCES donors ("donor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assays" (
  "assay_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assay */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sample associated with the assay */,
  "assay_name" TEXT /* Name of the assay performed on the sample */,
  "comment_label" TEXT /* Label for the comment associated with the assay */,
  "file_uri" TEXT /* URI pointing to the data file of the assay */,
  "fractionation_method" TEXT /* Fractionation method used in the assay */,
  "fraction_identifier" TEXT /* Identifier for the fraction used in the assay */,
  "instrument" TEXT /* Instrument used for the assay */,
  "assay_date" TEXT /* Date when the assay was conducted */,
  "assay_protocol" TEXT /* Protocol used for the assay */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assay_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assays_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "modifications" (
  "modification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each modification */,
  "assay_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assay associated with the modification */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the modification parameter */,
  "parameter_value" TEXT /* Value of the modification parameter */,
  "modification_type" TEXT /* Type of modification (e.g., chemical, enzymatic) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("modification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_modifications_assay_id FOREIGN KEY ("assay_id") REFERENCES assays ("assay_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cleavage_agents" (
  "cleavage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cleavage agent */,
  "assay_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assay associated with the cleavage agent */,
  "agent_name" TEXT /* Name of the cleavage agent */,
  "agent_details" TEXT /* Details about the cleavage agent */,
  "cleavage_site" TEXT /* Site at which cleavage occurs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cleavage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cleavage_agents_assay_id FOREIGN KEY ("assay_id") REFERENCES assays ("assay_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "assay_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assay the file is related to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the data file (e.g., mzML, mzXML) */,
  "file_description" TEXT /* Description of the data file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_assay_id FOREIGN KEY ("assay_id") REFERENCES assays ("assay_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, lab technician) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution affiliated with the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department within the institution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sample being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the sample */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the sample was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Location from which the sample was accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sample associated with the experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "date_conducted" TEXT /* Date when the experiment was conducted */,
  "experiment_design" TEXT /* Design of the experiment (e.g., case-control, cohort) */,
  "experimental_condition" TEXT /* Experimental conditions (e.g., temperature, pressure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment associated with the result */,
  "result_data" TEXT /* Data associated with the result */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comments related to the result */,
  "result_date" TEXT /* Date when the result was obtained */,
  "result_status" TEXT /* Status of the result (e.g., pending, complete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "treatments" (
  "treatment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each treatment record */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sample associated with the treatment */,
  "treatment_name" TEXT /* Name of the treatment protocol */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the treatment */,
  "date_administered" TEXT /* Date when the treatment was administered */,
  "treatment_dose" REAL /* Dose of the treatment administered */,
  "treatment_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the treatment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("treatment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_treatments_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "donors" (
  "donor_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each donor */,
  "donor_name" TEXT /* Name of the donor */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the donor */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the donor */,
  "disease_status" TEXT /* Disease status of the donor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("donor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instruments" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instrument */,
  "instrument_name" TEXT /* Name of the instrument */,
  "instrument_model" TEXT /* Model of the instrument */,
  "instrument_type" TEXT /* Type of instrument (e.g., mass spectrometer, microscope) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instrument_assays" (
  "instrument_assay_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instrument-assay pair */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument used in the assay */,
  "assay_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assay */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_assay_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instrument_assays_assay_id FOREIGN KEY ("assay_id") REFERENCES assays ("assay_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instrument_assays_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "references" (
  "reference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reference */,
  "reference_title" TEXT /* Title of the reference */,
  "reference_authors" TEXT /* Authors of the reference */,
  "reference_journal" TEXT /* Journal in which the reference was published */,
  "reference_year" INTEGER /* Year of publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reference_id")
)
